untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'Bullish Consensus' indicator which is not available in the allowed indicator set. Bullish Consensus is a sentiment/survey-based metric not computable from standard OHLCV data. RSI was used as a proxy for overbought/oversold conditions, but this is not a direct equivalent to the original signal specification.
translation_notes: Original signal requires Bullish Consensus (90% overbought, 20% oversold) which is not available. Substituted RSI_14 as a technical proxy for extremes. Entry uses moving average crossover (sma_20) to confirm directional change. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect the signal's dual-mode logic (long on uptrends, short on downtrends). The 2-week period translates to approximately 10 trading days, rounded to hold_days_max of 20 for conservative position management.
